All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class simulation.EventType
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class simulation.EventType
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
view - package view
 
vipAsiakasmäärä - Variable in class simulation.Controller
Counters for the number of customers that have arrived during the simulation, used to stop the simulation when the desired number of customers has arrived.
vipCloakroom - Variable in class controller.MenuController
Variable that records the amount of workers in VIP-Cloakroom.
vipCloakroomField - Variable in class controller.MenuController
TextField that takes the value for the amount of workers in VIP-Cloakroom.
vipCloakroomQueue - Variable in class simulation.Controller
Queues for the different service points and the arrival queue.
vipCustomerField - Variable in class controller.MenuController
TextField that takes the value for the amount of VIP-Customers.
vipCustomers - Variable in class controller.MenuController
Variable that records the amount of VIP-Customers.
vipKävijämäärä - Variable in class simulation.Controller
Counters for the number of customers that have arrived during the simulation, used to stop the simulation when the desired number of customers has arrived.
vipNarikka - Variable in class simulation.Controller
Service points for the different services in the simulation, each service point has a certain number of employees that can serve customers.
vipSecurity - Variable in class controller.MenuController
Variable that records the amount of workers in VIP-Security.
vipSecurity - Variable in class simulation.Controller
Service points for the different services in the simulation, each service point has a certain number of employees that can serve customers.
vipSecurityField - Variable in class controller.MenuController
TextField that takes the value for the amount of workers in VIP-Security.
vipSecurityQueue - Variable in class simulation.Controller
Queues for the different service points and the arrival queue.
